name: phase2_b5_learning
hypothesis: phase2_b10 and static_learning both preserved coverage and improved score; try a smaller phase-2 limit with learning to reduce runtime while keeping the useful search behavior.

name: compaction_c1_learning
hypothesis: static_learning was stable, while compaction strategy affects runtime and pattern count; reduce shuffle compaction effort to test whether runtime improves without a large pattern penalty.

name: phase2_b20_learning_seed1
hypothesis: phase2_b20 improved destc but was weaker on DMAtc; combine it with static learning and a fixed seed to test whether deeper retry search becomes more stable.

name: phase1_b20_learning
hypothesis: increase phase-1 FAN backtracking with static learning to see whether hard faults can be handled earlier without invoking phase-2 overhead.

name: reverse_phase2_b10
hypothesis: reverse-only compaction reduces runtime but increases patterns; combine it with moderate phase-2 search to test the runtime-pattern tradeoff under preserved coverage.
